Localization.Description: A user ran a process executable with missing metainfo

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {object.account.name} ran the file "{object.process.name}" with missing metainfo from the parent process {object.process.parent.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {object.account.id} ran the file "{object.process.name}" with missing metainfo from the parent process {object.process.parent.name} on host {event_src.host}
